title: ononis monophylla subsp. alba
intro: Ononis monophylla subsp. alba, also known as White Rest-harrow, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, characterized by its white flowers and a single leaf. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. Ononis monophylla subsp. alba is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
